subcodes.first_line: O servant of Truth! Though outwardly thou art in Shín [Shiraz] and We in Sín—that is to say, the province of Syria—yet in reality [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق هر چند بظاهر تو در شینی ما در سین یعنی ولایت سوریه اما فی الحقیقه
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
